---
title: "Events & Engagements"
---

I regularly participate in international conferences, workshops, and seminars to share my research on spatial data science, Google Earth Engine, and AI-driven remote sensing.

## 📅 Upcoming Events

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![ICC 2026](https://placehold.co/400x200/34495e/ffffff?text=ICC+2026)
### International Cartographic Conference
**The Future of Open Source GIS**  
*Keynote Address | August 2026*  
Join me for a deep dive into how open-source ecosystems are transforming global mapping standards.
[<i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> Conference Link](https://icc2026.org/){.social-btn}
:::

:::

## 🏛️ Past Seminars & Workshops

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![GDG Nairobi](images/gdg.jpg)
### GDG Earth Engine Nairobi
**Drought Monitoring with GEE AI Assistant**  
*Technical Seminar | 2024*  
Presented the integration of Gemini Pro API with Earth Engine for automated drought detection.
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> View Abstract](https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-presentation-ctnr"></i> Slides](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/publications.html){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![BHU Workshop](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=BHU+Workshop)
### Banaras Hindu University
**Cloud Computing in Geography**  
*Guest Lecture | 2024*  
A workshop focusing on migrating traditional GIS workflows to the Google Earth Engine cloud.
[<i class="bi bi-images"></i> Gallery](gallery.qmd){.social-btn}
:::

:::

## 📄 Call for Abstracts & Participation

Stay tuned for upcoming calls for abstracts in the regional and international geography congresses I am co-organizing. 

- **State Level Seminar on Geoinformatics** (Upcoming Q4 2026)
- **Special Issue on AI for Earth Observation** - *Open for submissions*

---

For invitations or collaborations for guest lectures and workshops, please reach out via [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/).
